summary: Frontend-only testing completed for Trucking Navigation App. All 15 features tested successfully. Login screen shows all 5 auth options (Google, Apple, Email, Create Account, Guest). Guest login works and navigates to Dashboard. All 13 sidebar tabs are clickable and load their views. Navigation view loads with satellite map, search bar, weather widget, compass, and map controls. Route calculation works with MUTCD road signs appearing on the map. Display Layout tab shows toggle controls with Show All/Hide All/Reset buttons working correctly. ELD Logs and Community views load properly.

minor.issue: TTS Error: API key reported as leaked (403 PERMISSION_DENIED) - affects voice guidance but app continues to function

action_items: Consider rotating the Gemini API key as it's reported as leaked (non-blocking - voice guidance falls back to native TTS)
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: LoginScreen.tsx has all 5 auth buttons with correct data-testid attributes
VERIFIED: useSignPlacement.ts lines 176-187 implement speed limit sign offset correctly (anchorX=58 for first sign, 21 for others)
VERIFIED: mutcdSigns.ts contains FHWA-standard sign SVGs with proper proportions and colors
VERIFIED: HudLayoutView.tsx dispatches hud-layout-changed event for sync with NavigationView
VERIFIED: useHudConfig.ts listens for hud-layout-changed events and updates state immediately
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx syncs sign visibility on hudLayout changes (lines 360-368)

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. MUTCD signs appear after route calculation. Speed limit sign offset implemented at lines 176-187 in useSignPlacement.ts. Gemini API key may need rotation but voice guidance falls back to native TTS. Preview URL: https://hud-customizer-5.preview.emergentagent.com

login_screen_google_signin.details: Sign In with Google button visible with data-testid='google-signin-btn'

login_screen_apple_signin.details: Sign In with Apple button visible with data-testid='apple-signin-btn'

login_screen_email_signin.details: Sign In with Email button visible with data-testid='email-signin-btn'

login_screen_create_account.details: Create Account button visible with data-testid='email-register-btn'

login_screen_guest_signin.details: Continue as Guest button visible with data-testid='guest-signin-btn'

guest_login_flow.details: Guest login navigates to Dashboard successfully

sidebar_navigation.details: All 13 sidebar tabs found and clickable: Dashboard, Navigation, Load Board, Truck Stops, Pay Summary, Maintenance, History, Fuel Network, Community, ELD Logs, Offline Maps, Display, Settings

navigation_view_loads.details: Navigation view loads with satellite map (MapTiler), search bar, weather widget (38°F), compass rose, and map controls

route_calculation.details: Route calculated successfully to Denver, CO. Route comparison panel shows 3 routes with time, distance, and fuel cost estimates

mutcd_signs_appear.details: MUTCD road signs appear on map after route calculation - speed limit signs and highway shields visible

speed_limit_sign_offset.details: Code verified: First speed limit sign has anchorX=58 (offset left), subsequent signs have anchorX=21 (centered). Implementation at useSignPlacement.ts lines 176-187

display_layout_tab.details: Display Layout tab shows 21/21 toggle controls with Live Preview, Show All, Hide All, Reset buttons, Trip Panel Position toggle, Speed Warning Tolerance settings

display_tab_buttons.details: Show All, Hide All, and Reset buttons found with correct data-testid attributes

eld_logs_view.details: ELD Logs view loads with FMCSA compliant interface, status buttons (Off Duty, Sleeper Berth, On Duty, Driving), Daily Log Graph, Status Changes log, Export CSV

community_view.details: Community view loads with report submission form, category counters (Parking, Fuel Price, Weigh Station, Road Hazard, Road Condition), Live Feed section

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live (HERE Maps, MapTiler, Firebase Auth)

known_issues.gemini_api_key: Gemini API key reported as leaked - voice guidance falls back to native TTS. Non-blocking issue.
